testsuite.name: E2E — Business endpoints contra backend real

testcase.name: POST /intrale/searchBusinesses con filtro APPROVED encuentra intrale

testsuite.system-out: 19:14:12.835 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - Iniciando Playwright [ApiBusinessE2ETest] — baseUrl=http://localhost:80, recordings=C:\Workspaces\Intrale\platform\qa\recordings 19:14:27.984 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - Tracing iniciado [ApiBusinessE2ETest] 19:14:28.184 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - SearchBusinesses query vacia: status=200 19:14:28.190 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - SearchBusinesses body: {"businesses":[{"businessId":"intrale-001","publicId":"intrale","name":"intrale","description":"Intrale (local dev)","emailAdmin":"admin@intrale.com","autoAcceptDeliveries":false,"status":"APPROVED"}],"statusCode":{"value":200,"description":"OK"}} 19:14:28.300 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - SearchBusinesses filtro APPROVED: status=200 19:14:28.300 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - SearchBusinesses body: {"businesses":[{"businessId":"intrale-001","publicId":"intrale","name":"intrale","description":"Intrale (local dev)","emailAdmin":"admin@intrale.com","autoAcceptDeliveries":false,"status":"APPROVED"}],"statusCode":{"value":200,"description":"OK"}} 19:14:28.362 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - SearchBusinesses sin body: status=400 19:14:28.569 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - RegisterBusiness: status=200 19:14:28.569 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - RegisterBusiness body: {"statusCode":{"value":200,"description":"OK"}} 19:14:28.595 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - RegisterBusiness sin body: status=400 19:14:28.636 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - Trace guardado: C:\Workspaces\Intrale\platform\qa\recordings\ApiBusinessE2ETest-trace.zip 19:14:29.018 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - Cerrando Playwright [ApiBusinessE2ETest]
